Unit Economics
The Numbers
£87k Monthly Revenue · Mature

225 tx/day × £13.00 AOV × 30 trading days. Mature state from Month 9.

£300k Total Raise

£65k hard costs. £235k cash — deposit, float, reserve, Site 2 planning.

23.5% EBITDA Margin · Mature

At 225 tx/day from Month 9. Expands to 25.4% by Year 5 across 5 sites.

£24B Market Size

UK grab-and-go. Protein segment at £3.1B growing 6.6% CAGR — double the market.

Smoothies & Shakes
The Attach
Effect.

40% shake attach rate adds £3.20 to every transaction. 20% snack attach adds £0.50. Together they build the £13.00 blended AOV that makes the model work.

40% Shake Attach 20% Snack Attach 32g+ Per Shake
Average Order Value
£13.00
Every transaction. Every day.
Food Bowls, wraps & breakfast £9.25 71%
Shake 40% attach · £8.00 × 40% £3.20 25%
Snack 20% attach · £2.50 × 20% £0.50 4%
× 225 tx/day × 29 trading days = £85,072/mo mature revenue
Transaction Ramp
tx/day Trajectory

40 tx/day at open → 225 mature state (Month 9). Break-even at 140 tx/day (Month 7+).

EBITDA Positive

Roadmap
Month 1Site opens. Angel / Upper Street, Islington.
